meta.source: Generated from repository components.json and tokens.json
principles: Global tokens are for typography and layout.
Interactive behavior is deterministic and explicit.

constraints: When state=disabled, interactive states and focus ring are suppressed.
When isOpen=true, the component must expose its expanded/open surface and keep focus management deterministic.
When state=disabled, interactive states and focus ring are suppressed.
contentType=image requires a valid image source; contentType=initials requires 1–3 characters.

isSelected only changes selection semantics; disabled still overrides selected visuals.
